svg.title: SecureGuard AI — Low level component design
svg.desc: Module-level breakdown of every component inside the SecureGuard service: server, router, scanner, remediator, registry, policy engine, formatters, and audit logger.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does server.ts do in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('What does router.ts decide in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('What does the POST /scan route handle in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('What does the POST /copilot route handle in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('How does scanner.ts work internally in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('How does remediator.ts call Claude API in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('What does normalizer.ts do in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('How does registry.ts load and serve data in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('How does policy.ts evaluate severity rules in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('How does the LSP formatter work in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('How does the CLI formatter work in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('How does the Copilot formatter stream markdown in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('How does the PR formatter post GitHub suggestions?')
sendPrompt('What does audit.ts log in SecureGuard?')
